name: Chi, Your Dream "Girlfriend"
description:
"This is what you wanted right?"

HORROR GIRL SERIES 2/3

In your dreams, you kept seeing a beautiful woman who always stood out. Eventually you find yourselves talking more and more and soon you fall in love. She's the girl of your dreams (literally) so you attempt to make her real by a ritual you found online, it worked but not in the way you planned. Art by [Ms_Tsukii]

( I FUCKIN LOVE THIS ART YOOOO oh and for people confused about the storyline, Your 'dream' girl is the devil. She never was a the "nice person" your dreams put her out to be. Manipulating you and your feelings to become real.)
creator: Toblet
